race.comment: READY AND LUCKY (7) at her top now fifth-up and like the way she closed strongly with a game third over 1280m at this track with the 59.5kg. Maps to race much closer here with the 3kg claim. No excuses here. MISSILE MAGNATE (5) blinkers go on and set to peak fourth-up. Failed to close off in a solid race when fourth over 1300m at Wyong. Each way contender. FLAMBOYANT LAD (4) gritty on-pace performance with the 59.5kg to secure third over 1400m at Mudgee. Back in trip and he gets an economical run for this. Sure to be around the money again. GIRRAWHEEN (8) bounced off his good first-up second, with a dominant on-pace win over 1200m at Mudgee. Keep safe from the sticky gate.
